allow:
Bash(systemctl --user list-units --state=active 2>/dev/null | grep -i portamail || true
ls ~/.config/autostart/ 2>/dev/null || true
ls ~/.config/systemd/user/ 2>/dev/null || true)
Bash(systemctl --user daemon-reload && systemctl --user enable portamail.service && echo "enabled")
Bash(dpkg -l ros-jazzy-micro-ros-agent 2>/dev/null | tail -1; snap list micro-ros-agent 2>/dev/null | tail -1; which micro-ros-agent 2>/dev/null || true)

Bash(cat /boot/firmware/cmdline.txt && echo "===" && ls /etc/systemd/system/display-off-on-shutdown.service && echo "===" && cat /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/51-blank-on-start.conf && echo "===" && systemctl is-enabled display-off-on-shutdown.service)

Bash(find /etc /usr/share -name "plymouthd.conf" 2>/dev/null && echo "===" && find /etc -name "*.plymouth" 2>/dev/null && echo "===" && update-alternatives --display default.plymouth 2>/dev/null | head -10)
Bash(cd ~/PortaMailCapstone && colcon build --packages-select portamail_navigator portamail_coordinator 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/state 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('screen:', d.get\('screen'\), '| mode:', d.get\('mode'\)\)")

Bash(curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/events" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; evts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(evts\)} events'\); [print\(f'  {e[\\"ts\\"]} {e[\\"name\\"]}'\) for e in evts[-10:]]" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/state 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('screen:', d['screen']\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "Flask not responding")
Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/state | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('screen:', d['screen']\)")

Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/edge -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"edge":"go_back"}' | python3 -m json.tool && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/state | python3 -c "import sys,json; print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)['screen']\)")
Bash(cd ~/PortaMailCapstone/LCD_web/portamail_ui && venv/bin/pip show flask-socketio 2>/dev/null | grep Version; venv/bin/pip show python-socketio 2>/dev/null | grep Version)

Bash(pkill -f "lcd_bridge" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "venv/bin/python app.py" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "ros2 launch portamail" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "slam_toolbox" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "sllidar_node" 2>/dev/null; echo "Killed zombie processes"; sleep 2; ps aux | grep -E "lcd_bridge|app.py" | grep -v grep | wc -l)

Bash(pkill -f "lcd_bridge" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "venv/bin/python app.py" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "ros2 launch portamail" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "sllidar_node" 2>/dev/null || true; echo "done")
Bash(kill -9 3105 5047 5443 6243 7807 40690 40266 41028 41349 41448 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ss -tlnp | grep 5050; ps aux | grep -E "lcd_bridge|app\\.py" | grep -v grep | wc -l)

Bash(pkill -9 -f sync_slam_toolbox_node 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f foxglove_bridge 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f mock_driver 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f map_autosave_node 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f navigation_coordinator 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f robot_state_publisher 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f joy_node 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f teleop_node 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f sllidar_node 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f lcd_bridge 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f "app.py" 2>/dev/null; echo "done")
